scenarios.title: Device Damage Due to Unauthorized Modification
scenarios.description: Customer reports the iPhone has been physically altered or tampered with, resulting in malfunction.

policy_references.snippet: The Plan does not apply to an iPhone that has been modified to alter its functionality or capability without the written permission of the manufacturer.

scenarios.reasoning: The device has been modified without authorization, which is explicitly excluded under section 4.2(iii). Therefore, the claim is not covered.
